## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build` all pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Tools remain read-only; no secrets committed
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if behavior or tool surface changed
